name: wireframe-to-html
description: 勾勒 + 文字描述 → HTML：Excalidraw 画板 + 本地 CLI（Claude Code / OpenCode）生成 HTML 预览

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.dev:api: cross-env WTH_DEV=1 PORT=3001 npm run dev -w @wth/server
scripts.build: npm run gen:controls && npm run build -w @wth/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @wth/web && npm run typecheck -w @wth/server
